sentences.en: I like it because it's easy.
sentences.r: Wǒ xǐhuan tā, yīnwèi tā jiǎndān.

sentences.en: How do I tell him no?
sentences.r: Wǒ zěnme gēn tā shuō bù ne?

sentences.en: I think it's too expensive.
sentences.r: Wǒ juéde tài guì le.

sentences.en: I feel bad because I didn't sleep.
sentences.r: Wǒ méi shuì hǎo, suǒyǐ bù shūfu.

sentences.en: I'm calm, everything's fine.
sentences.r: Wǒ hěn píngjìng, yíqiè dōu hǎo.

sentences.t: 我西班牙语说得比以前好了。
sentences.en: I speak Spanish better than before.
sentences.r: Wǒ Xībānyáyǔ shuō de bǐ yǐqián hǎo le.

sentences.en: It's not worth what it costs.
sentences.r: Bù zhí zhège jià.

sentences.t: 不好意思，去酒店怎么走？
sentences.en: Excuse me, how do I get to the hotel?
sentences.r: Bù hǎoyìsi, qù jiǔdiàn zěnme zǒu?

sentences.en: You need to drink more water.
sentences.r: Nǐ děi duō hē shuǐ.

sentences.en: You have to try again.
sentences.r: Nǐ děi zài shì yí cì.

sentences.en: You should ask if you don't understand.
sentences.r: Bù dǒng jiù yīnggāi wèn.

sentences.en: I've been waiting for an hour.
sentences.r: Wǒ yǐjīng děng le yí ge xiǎoshí.

sentences.en: I have to do the shopping.
sentences.r: Wǒ děi qù cǎigòu.

sentences.en: I think it's going to rain.
sentences.r: Wǒ juéde yào xiàyǔ le.

sentences.en: They say it's going to rain.
sentences.r: Tīngshuō yào xiàyǔ.

sentences.en: Wait, it's not this way.
sentences.r: Děngděng, bú shì zhèbiān.

sentences.en: Let's meet at eight, okay?
sentences.r: Wǒmen bā diǎn jiàn, xíng ma?

sentences.t: 免费的时候我最开心了。
sentences.en: I love when it's free.
sentences.r: Miǎnfèi de shíhou wǒ zuì kāixīn le.

sentences.en: I'm tired because I worked a lot.
sentences.r: Wǒ lèi le, yīnwèi gōngzuò tài duō.

sentences.t: 我们累了，因为走了好多路。
sentences.en: We're tired because we walked a lot.
sentences.r: Wǒmen lèi le, yīnwèi zǒu le hǎoduō lù.

sentences.en: How old do you think I am?
sentences.r: Nǐ cāi wǒ duō dà?

sentences.en: I'm right this time, trust me.
sentences.r: Zhè cì wǒ shì duì de, xiāngxìn wǒ.

sentences.t: 我超喜欢你说西班牙语。
sentences.en: I love it when you speak Spanish.
sentences.r: Wǒ chāo xǐhuan nǐ shuō Xībānyáyǔ.

sentences.en: You have to eat to live.
sentences.r: Rén děi chīfàn cái néng huó.

sentences.t: 只要练，我就能学会这个。
sentences.en: I can learn this if I practice.
sentences.r: Zhǐyào liàn, wǒ jiù néng xuéhuì zhège.

sentences.en: We're a little late, sorry.
sentences.r: Wǒmen yǒudiǎn wǎn le, bàoqiàn.

sentences.en: How much did he tell you it cost?
sentences.r: Tā gēn nǐ shuō yào duōshao qián?

sentences.en: What do you want me to say?
sentences.r: Nǐ xiǎng ràng wǒ shuō shénme?

sentences.en: She asked me if I knew you.
sentences.r: Tā wèn wǒ rèn bu rènshi nǐ.

sentences.en: Bring me a water, please.
sentences.r: Gěi wǒ ná píng shuǐ, xièxie.

sentences.en: Run, the bus is coming.
sentences.r: Kuài pǎo, gōngjiāo lái le.

sentences.t: 我觉得我们昨天吃太多了。
sentences.en: I think we ate too much yesterday.
sentences.r: Wǒ juéde wǒmen zuótiān chī tài duō le.

sentences.t: 只要一直努力，我们就能成。
sentences.en: We can make it if we keep trying.
sentences.r: Zhǐyào yìzhí nǔlì, wǒmen jiù néng chéng.

sentences.t: 我工作的时候吃得不多。
sentences.en: I don't eat much when I'm working.
sentences.r: Wǒ gōngzuò de shíhou chī de bù duō.

sentences.en: I can't, I have to work.
sentences.r: Wǒ bùxíng, wǒ děi gōngzuò.

sentences.en: I get up, eat, and work.
sentences.r: Wǒ qǐchuáng、chīfàn、ránhòu gōngzuò.

sentences.t: 我想喝咖啡，但更想睡觉。
sentences.en: I want coffee, but I'd rather sleep.
sentences.r: Wǒ xiǎng hē kāfēi, dàn gèng xiǎng shuìjiào.

sentences.en: If it's cheap, I'll buy it.
sentences.r: Piányi de huà wǒ jiù mǎi.

sentences.t: 你喜欢的话我们就多点。
sentences.en: If you like it, we'll order more.
sentences.r: Nǐ xǐhuan de huà wǒmen jiù duō diǎn.

sentences.en: I want to buy it, but not right now.
sentences.r: Wǒ xiǎng mǎi, dàn bú shì xiànzài.

sentences.en: When I have money, I'll buy it.
sentences.r: Děng wǒ yǒu qián le jiù mǎi.

sentences.en: When I was a kid, I ate a lot.
sentences.r: Wǒ xiǎoshíhou chī de hěn duō.

sentences.en: I want a little more time.
sentences.r: Wǒ xiǎng zài duō diǎn shíjiān.

sentences.en: I don't know where he's from.
sentences.r: Wǒ bù zhīdào tā shì nǎlǐ rén.

sentences.en: He doesn't do anything at home.
sentences.r: Tā zài jiā shénme dōu bú gàn.

sentences.en: Tomorrow we're going out to eat.
sentences.r: Míngtiān wǒmen chūqù chīfàn.

sentences.en: She likes coffee.
sentences.r: Tā xǐhuan kāfēi.

sentences.en: He likes to sleep a lot.
sentences.r: Tā xǐhuan shuì lǎnjiào.

sentences.t: 我不知道是谁告诉她的。
sentences.en: I don't know who told her.
sentences.r: Wǒ bù zhīdào shì shéi gàosu tā de.

sentences.en: Are you from here or not?
sentences.r: Nǐ dàodǐ shì bu shì běndì rén?

sentences.en: The food's in the kitchen.
sentences.r: Fàn zài chúfáng.

sentences.en: Why are you in my room?
sentences.r: Nǐ wèishénme zài wǒ fángjiān?

sentences.en: Today I feel a little off.
sentences.r: Wǒ jīntiān yǒudiǎn bú zài zhuàngtài.

sentences.en: I know how to speak a little Spanish.
sentences.r: Wǒ huì shuō yìdiǎn Xībānyáyǔ.

sentences.en: I'm going to order my usual.
sentences.r: Wǒ diǎn wǒ píngcháng nàge.

sentences.en: And what are you going to order?
sentences.r: Nà nǐ yào diǎn shénme?

sentences.en: Yesterday I went to work by bus.
sentences.r: Zuótiān wǒ zuò gōngjiāo qù shàngbān.

sentences.t: 我跟朋友一起去吃饭了。
sentences.en: I went to eat with my friend.
sentences.r: Wǒ gēn péngyou yìqǐ qù chīfàn le.

sentences.en: Are you Ana's friend?
sentences.r: Nǐ shì Ānnà de péngyou ma?

sentences.en: At night I'm really tired.
sentences.r: Wǎnshang wǒ zhēn de hǎo lèi.

sentences.en: I don't feel like working today.
sentences.r: Wǒ jīntiān bù xiǎng gōngzuò.

sentences.en: The coffee here is really expensive.
sentences.r: Zhèr de kāfēi zhēn guì.

sentences.en: It's really hot in the kitchen.
sentences.r: Chúfáng lǐ tèbié rè.

sentences.en: I'm hot and I feel bad.
sentences.r: Wǒ yòu rè yòu nánshòu.

sentences.en: The food's on the table.
sentences.r: Fàn zài zhuō shàng.

sentences.en: Your phone is on the bed.
sentences.r: Nǐ shǒujī zài chuáng shàng.

sentences.en: I don't want to pay again.
sentences.r: Wǒ bù xiǎng zài fù yí cì qián.

sentences.t: 我明天早上给你打电话。
sentences.en: I'll call you tomorrow morning.
sentences.r: Wǒ míngtiān zǎoshang gěi nǐ dǎ diànhuà.

sentences.en: I can't this weekend.
sentences.r: Zhè zhōumò wǒ méi kòng.

sentences.en: The dog is in the kitchen.
sentences.r: Gǒu zài chúfáng lǐ.

sentences.en: What time does the train arrive?
sentences.r: Huǒchē jǐ diǎn dào?

sentences.en: Now I live close to work.
sentences.r: Wǒ xiànzài zhù de lí gōngsī jìn.

sentences.en: Why does your head hurt?
sentences.r: Nǐ tóu wèishénme téng?

sentences.en: My head has hurt since yesterday.
sentences.r: Wǒ cóng zuótiān jiù kāishǐ tóuténg.

sentences.en: I'll be back in a moment.
sentences.r: Wǒ yíhuìr jiù huílái.

sentences.en: We love the food here.
sentences.r: Wǒmen chāo ài zhèr de cài.

sentences.en: I don't like waiting a long time.
sentences.r: Wǒ bù xǐhuan děng hěn jiǔ.

sentences.en: I only come home to sleep.
sentences.r: Wǒ zhǐshì huíjiā shuìjiào.

sentences.en: I'll be back Monday morning.
sentences.r: Wǒ xīngqīyī zǎoshang huílái.

sentences.en: I'll pay the check this time.
sentences.r: Zhè cì wǒ lái mǎidān.

sentences.en: Keep going and turn right.
sentences.r: Yìzhí zǒu ránhòu wǎng yòu guǎi.

sentences.en: Do I walk or take the bus?
sentences.r: Wǒ shì zǒulù háishi zuò gōngjiāo?

sentences.en: Downtown is far on foot.
sentences.r: Zǒulù qù shìzhōngxīn hěn yuǎn.

sentences.en: The cat's in my room.
sentences.r: Māo zài wǒ fángjiān lǐ.

sentences.en: I don't live far from the city.
sentences.r: Wǒ zhù de lí chéng lǐ bù yuǎn.

sentences.t: 你为什么什么都不跟我说？
sentences.en: Why didn't you tell me anything?
sentences.r: Nǐ wèishénme shénme dōu bù gēn wǒ shuō?

sentences.t: 我在沙发底下找到手机了。
sentences.en: I found my phone under the couch.
sentences.r: Wǒ zài shāfā dǐxia zhǎodào shǒujī le.

sentences.en: The station is near here.
sentences.r: Chēzhàn lí zhèr hěn jìn.

sentences.en: I'm going to my mom's place.
sentences.r: Wǒ qù wǒ mā nàr.

sentences.en: My mom's in the kitchen.
sentences.r: Wǒ mā zài chúfáng.

sentences.en: My mom loves cooking.
sentences.r: Wǒ mā chāo ài zuòfàn.

sentences.en: I get off work at five.
sentences.r: Wǒ wǔ diǎn xiàbān.

sentences.en: The book is on the table.
sentences.r: Shū zài zhuō shàng.

sentences.en: My keys are under the book.
sentences.r: Wǒ yàoshi zài shū dǐxia.
